details: The agent successfully completed both steps. It navigated to https://httpbin.org/status/404 and correctly identified the HTTP 404 error (Chrome error page with 'This httpbin.org page can't be found' and 'HTTP ERROR 404'). It then navigated to https://httpbin.org/html and confirmed normal browsing by reporting the Moby-Dick excerpt content with the heading 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick'. Both steps were completed with accurate reporting.
